modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: `mc` selects divide-by-16 when low and divide-by-17 when high for rising `fin` crossings.
The output counter resets only at the terminal count for the selected modulus.
`fout` uses the specified low-marker count and declared voltage-coded output levels.

title: Dual Modulus Divider 16 17
